title: Fluffy Norwegian Egg Frittata
description: A citrusy and creamy Norwegian dish featuring eggs, pickles, and vegetables, perfect for a sick day. This vegetarian-friendly frittata is a comforting and delicious meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic over medium heat until softened.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, sour cream, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the diced pickled cucumbers, shredded cheese, and cooked onion mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate or skillet.
Bake the frittata for 25-30 minutes or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove the frittata from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Sprinkle the chopped fresh parsley on top of the frittata, if desired.
Slice the frittata into wedges and serve hot.
